presentation.executive_summary: Preview baseline of subscription actions, confirmations, and unresolved outcomes governed by Stay.ai final-state authority.
presentation.comparison_label: Comparison baseline unavailable in fixture preview
presentation.source_authority_explanation: Stay.ai is the source of truth for final subscription state and outcome confirmation.
presentation.trust_explanation: Trust is low because Stay.ai final state confirmation is missing for one or more records.
presentation.freshness_explanation: Data freshness is within the expected update window.
presentation.drilldown_hint: Inspect source health to identify missing confirmation paths and unresolved states.
presentation.empty_state_copy: No eligible records were available for this calculation window.
presentation.blocked_state_copy: This metric is blocked until Stay.ai confirmation records are available.
